stemHtml:
During an IFR flight, ATC passes the pilot the following message:
"D-EASA, reset squawk 5416, new QNH 1022, contact Bern Control on 124.680".

What should the pilot's read back contain?

options.a: The new assigned frequency and the new QNH. The controller can see the squawk on the radar screen.
options.b: The squawk, the new QNH and the new assigned frequency.
